steps.title: Find the key transition point
steps.content: The passage establishes one pivotal fact: “the original ticker tape had long since been retired by the 2019 parade.” This creates a gap—the blank sentence must show what happened after.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: ”Then” shows what came next in sequence: the original ticker tape was retired, then shredded standard paper enriched the celebration. The other three don't establish this forward progression. That matches choice D — D is correct.
